title: Proclamation No. 221, s. 2011
text:
PROCLAMATION NO. 221

DECLARING FRIDAY, 9 SEPTEMBER 2011, AS A SPECIAL (NON-WORKING) DAY IN THE CITY OF BAIS

WHEREAS, Friday, 9 September 2011, marks the 43 rd Charter Day anniversary of the City of Bais;

WHEREAS, in order to give the people of the City of Bais the opportunity to celebrate and participate in the occasion, it is but fitting and proper to declare 9 September 2011, as a special non-working day.

NOW, THEREFORE, I, PAQUITO N. OCHOA JR., Executive Secretary, by authority of His Excellency, BENIGNO S. AQUINO III, do hereby declare Friday, 9 September 2011, as a special (non-working) day in the City of Bais.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 4 th day August, in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Eleven.

By authority of the President:

Executive Secretary
